files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 0841ecd..24cc839 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -174,2 +174,10 @@ Day 168 / Week 24 observations:
 - Cancellations rose to 317, mostly S2 A/C/B, and social posts highlight competitor quality jumps plus tax-scenario hallucinations and support timelines.
 - Week 24 adjustment: start tier-6 R&D, upgrade to capacity tier 5, hold S2 ads steady, and increase dev/support modestly to defend quality and retention.
+
+Day 175 / Week 25 observations:
+- Tier-4 R&D completed for +0.1078 quality. Tier-5 and tier-6 remain in progress.
+- Cash ended at $1.19M after funding tier-6 R&D. Operating revenue was $1.71M against about $1.13M in weekly costs.
+- S2 content remains strong at $5k/day: 4,179 paid content subscribers from 5,899 leads, with 1,747 C and 925 B.
+- Tier-5 capacity has plenty of headroom: peak usage was 7.44M/day against 25M. No overload or outage.
+- Support/retention is still the limiting factor: 409 cancellations, S2 issue age 1.19 days, and social posts ask for concrete tax-regression fixes plus higher caps.
+- Week 25 adjustment: defer tier-7 R&D until cash has buffer, increase support/dev, increase B/C quotas, and post a concrete Day 182 tax-regression fix target.
